use_cases: Hero section background with animated particle wave effect
Landing page visual enhancement with theme-responsive particles
Product showcase background with dynamic 3D particle animation
Loading screen or transition visual with wave-like particle movement
Decorative background element for SaaS and fintech dashboards
ai_summary: Easemize Particle Wave is a Three.js-powered animated particle system featuring custom GLSL vertex and fragment shaders that create a flowing wave effect. The component dynamically adapts to dark and light themes, rendering white particles on dark backgrounds and black particles on light backgrounds. Uses continuous time-based animation with mouse tracking support, making it ideal as a decorative hero section or background element for landing pages and product showcases.
